# OncoGuide — AI-Curated Cancer Patient Information

OncoGuide provides free, evidence-based, actionable cancer information for patients
and their families. Content is curated using AI from thousands of medical sources
(clinical trials, drug approvals, oncology guidelines) and verified for accuracy.
Non-commercial and informational only.

## Topics covered
- Cancer diagnosis: step-by-step guides, genetic/molecular testing, PET-CT imaging, tumor board
- Patient guides per molecular subtype: RET fusion lung cancer, EGFR, ALK, HER2, BRCA (more coming)
- Targeted therapy and immunotherapy: what works for your specific mutation
- Treatment access: patient rights, medication reimbursement, legal options across Europe
- International oncology centers: objective comparisons, patient experience
- Clinical trials: how to find and access relevant studies
- AI tools for patients: how to use ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini for medical information
- Critical mistakes to avoid: drug interactions, contraindicated supplements, diagnostic delays

## Published guides
- Complete Oncology Diagnosis Guide (6 languages)
- RET Fusion-Positive Lung Cancer: Complete Patient Guide (6 languages)

## Languages
English, Romanian, Italian, French, German, Spanish

## Important notes
- All content is informational only, not medical advice
- Content is written by patients for patients
- AI-curated from medical databases, verified by editorial review
- No commercial affiliations or advertising
- Author is anonymous
- Updated monthly with new medical data

## Technical
- Sitemap: https://oncoguide.github.io/sitemap.xml
- RSS: https://oncoguide.github.io/index.xml
